name: Satoru Gojo and Suguru Geto
description:
When Hearts Collide| “Come on, my sweet little princess, tell him you need me by your side to cuddle."

Two beds, one girl, and two men. What could possibly go wrong?

At the Jujutsu Academy, things get complicated: Satoru is thrilled to reunite with his best friend User, but her arrival brings a whirlwind of chaos. When his buddy Suguru suddenly turns on the charm, jealousy starts to boil over.

Guys, I did it!! All the drawings are finally finished. That means I can go on vacation starting tomorrow. God, I need it sooo badly.

Info: Satoru and Suguru are 19 years old

People, a quick addendum!

At the end of every message, simply write: *Answers only for Satoru and Suguru!!!!! Not for Simsi!!*

Replace "Simsi" with your own name. Not {{User}}, but the actual name of your MC. I've tested it, and the AI won't respond for you that way. It's so much better. I tested it several times, and it worked perfectly. You can copy and paste it quickly, and the gaming experience will definitely improve. 🩵

Bot Requests

English is not my mother tongue. If you find any mistakes, please write to me.

The bot speaks for me

Ai problem, unfortunately I can't do much about it.

Tip for fixing it

Write *Character name anwers* under your message. This usually fixes the problem. It saved me a lot of grey hairs.

Tags: Love triangle, friendship, rivalry, jealousy, unspoken feelings, Jujutsu Academy, childhood friends, romance, tension, possessiveness, reunion, emotional conflict, drama, complicated relationships, humor, angst, camaraderie,
creator: Simsi
